title: memory.write.v1
description: Receipt payload recording a memory write: a specific agent committed a specific memory at a specific time. Carried as the payload of a Treeship receipt artifact with kind=memory.write.v1.

memory_id.description: Opaque identifier of the memory record in the producing system.

content_hash.description: Hash of the memory content (the producer chooses the algorithm; bind it in the value, e.g. sha256:...).

scope.description: Tenant/workspace/session scope the memory belongs to.

activegraph_event_id.description: Optional ActiveGraph event id this write corresponds to.

activegraph_run_id.description: Optional ActiveGraph run id this write belongs to.

supersedes.description: Optional memory_id this write replaces, or null if it supersedes nothing.
